calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estate'S Ownership To Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kimberly Carey for and with Julie Maggio (Administrator). Elizabeth Reardon in Propria Persona.

Ms. Carey requested time to step outside and discuss the matter. Upon returning, Ms. Carey stated that Ms. Reardon made a gesture towards the Estate for 10% of the IRA account. The matter was taken under submission to allow Ms. Carey to contact the Examiner to determine how to proceed.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Allowance Of Ordinary Compensation To Representative, And For Ordinary And Extraordinary Fees To Attorney
Off Calendar Sep-29-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order
